atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right foot pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right foot pain following a tennis injury, describing a fall and twisting of his foot

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes ibuprofen for the pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness or tingling

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that he is unable to continue playing tennis due to the injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's vitals are within normal limits: blood pressure 120/75, respiratory rate 18, temperature 97.1°F, and pulse 60 bpm

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A physical exam reveals bruising of the plantar and dorsal aspects of the right foot, swelling, and warmth

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The right foot exam reveals a positive piano key test of the first and second metatarsals

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Capillary refill is less than 3 seconds

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's left foot exam is normal

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports stridor

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a Lisfranc fracture, likely secondary to the tennis injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The examination findings and X-ray confirm a dorsal displacement of the second metatarsal base with a 3mm separation of the first and second metatarsal bases and a bony fragment in the Lisfranc joint space

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms are consistent with a Lisfranc fracture

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports a Lisfranc fracture.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes surgery.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an MRI.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up in approximately one week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a cast for six to eight weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes crutches for six to eight weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends physical therapy after surgery.
